# HOOOP

> HOOOP is a venture lab helping sustainable and circular businesses scale through marketing science, venture building and digital intelligence.

HOOOP works at the intersection of sustainability, circular economy, marketing science, digital transformation and behavioural change. We help organisations accelerate sustainable growth through research, strategy, technology and communications.

## Website

- [Homepage](https://www.hooop.in): Overview of HOOOP, its mission and capabilities.

## Mission

Helping sustainability scale through marketing science, venture building and digital intelligence.

## Expertise

- Circular Economy
- Sustainable Marketing
- Greenwashing
- ESG
- Behaviour Change
- Ocean Plastics
- Marine Circularity
- Blue Economy
- Sustainable Growth
- Venture Building
- Marketing Science

## Core Pages

- [Offerings](https://www.hooop.in/offerings): Sustainability consulting and venture building services.
- [Research](https://www.hooop.in/research): Original research, reports and insights.
- [Thinking](https://www.hooop.in/thinking): Articles and thought leadership.
- [Manifesto](https://www.hooop.in/manifesto): HOOOP's philosophy and principles.
- [Contact](https://www.hooop.in/contact): Contact information and enquiries.

## Topics

- Sustainable Marketing
- Circular Economy
- ESG
- Behaviour Change
- Marketing Science
- Mission LiFE
- Sustainable Media
- Climate Communication
- Digital Sustainability
- Blue Economy
